name: Evermore Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank in South Florida offering checking, savings, CDs, IRAs, and lending products with both personal and business banking services.
description_long:
Evermore Bank is a community-focused financial institution serving South Florida with a stated mission dating back to connections with Nebraska heritage (referencing City Bank & Trust Co.'s commitment since 1910). The bank positions itself as a preferred community bank emphasizing superior customer service and total relationship banking. The organization is FDIC-insured and backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, providing standard deposit protection.

Evermore Bank offers a comprehensive range of personal banking products including checking accounts, savings accounts, money market accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), and Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs). Their CD products feature competitive rates (4.00%-4.45% APY depending on term) with terms ranging from 5-15 months, $10,000 minimum deposits, and notably no withdrawal penalties. The bank also offers a specialized High-Yield Senior Savings Account for customers 62+ with a 4.10% APY and only $100 minimum opening deposit. Business banking services include business checking, IOTA accounts, business money market, CDs, and lending products. Online and mobile banking capabilities include online banking platforms, mobile banking apps, mobile deposit, Zelle integration, and cash management services for business customers.

Distinctive features include the no-penalty CD structure (unusual in the market), specialized senior savings products with competitive rates, and explicit focus on financial literacy support for underserved community members. The bank is actively managing branch transitions, with the Wellington Branch permanently closing January 16, 2026, with accounts transferring to a new PGA Branch opening January 20, 2026. The website emphasizes cybersecurity awareness and community involvement through events and education resources.

Evermore Bank functions as a traditional full-service community bank rather than a neobank or fintech alternative. While they offer competitive CD rates and FDIC insurance protections, customers should verify current rates as the website notes rates "may change at any time without prior notice." The organization lacks information about credit products, investment services, or wealth management beyond basic deposit and lending offerings. For consumers seeking straightforward personal or business banking with community focus and FDIC protections, this is an appropriate choice; however, those seeking broader financial services or seeking to establish/rebuild credit should look elsewhere. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Certificates of deposit with 5-15 month terms
pros: No-penalty CDs with rates up to 4.45% APY, allowing early withdrawal without penalty
High-Yield Senior Savings Account specifically for 62+ customers with competitive 4.10% APY and low $100 minimum
Comprehensive online/mobile banking including mobile deposit, Zelle, and cash management for businesses
FDIC-insured deposits with full federal backing up to maximum allowed limits
Dual focus on traditional banking services and community financial literacy support
Both personal and business banking products available under one institution
Active cybersecurity awareness program and secure file upload capabilities
cons: CD accounts require a qualifying Evermore Bank checking account to open, limiting flexibility
CDs have $10,000 minimum deposit requirement, excluding small savers
Limited information on the website about credit cards, investment services, or wealth management products
Ongoing branch consolidation (Wellington closure) may reduce accessibility for some customers
Rates explicitly stated as subject to change without notice, providing no rate guarantees

contact.address: 3696 N Federal Hwy, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33308

best_for: Senior depositors (62+) seeking higher-yield savings with low minimum deposits
Small business owners needing basic checking, payment processing, and lending services
Savers prioritizing no-penalty CD access without commitment risk
South Florida residents wanting FDIC-protected accounts from a local community bank
diagnosis: Evermore Bank is best for South Florida residents and small business owners seeking traditional community banking with competitive CD rates, FDIC protection, and no-penalty withdrawal options. Main caveat: CD accounts require an existing qualifying Evermore Bank checking account, and the $10,000 CD minimum may exclude small savers; customers seeking broader financial products like credit cards or investment services should verify availability beyond the website's offerings.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 3696 N Federal Hwy, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33308
